news.title: Federal judge blocks Arizona from bringing criminal charges against Kalshi
news.summary: Judge Michael Liburdi ordered Arizona not to bring any enforcement actions under state law against Kalshi, at least temporarily.

news.title: Star Xu calls CZ a ‘liar’ as founders of world’s largest crypto exchanges argue over past allegations
news.summary: The dispute between the crypto exchange founders, which included a $1 billion wager from CZ, revives allegations dating back 11 years to Zhao’s time at OKCoin.
